textByHashes.247bb12591f31e6605d7f4b235183885934352b3: When Jelly was just a baby troll, parents left him in Slayer cave... But Jelly is strong, Jelly learn to survive in the cave, and one day Jelly will become great Slayer master!
textByHashes.e7add6ec2abab3beac4627527f1f21ebb08b6ffe: When the Kurasks finded new treasures, many humans come to the Slayer cave to hunt them... No Kurasks left for Jelly to train on, so Jelly makes a private area just for training. These be Jelly's very own Kurask!
textByHashes.895b99c7f7ea8ffca3ac3dc152f4239b9cc9a386: Not just any human gets to train up here, you has to be on a Kurask Slayer task.
textByHashes.5357cfdb79ae61a16be202184ee30df09e2cd8cb: Jelly grew up in this cave, there not much choice around for a hungry troll...
textByHashes.a15f1a1e35f613a73aceb07959d523356bdeffd9: Naughty human! You not hunting the Kurask! Jelly's Kurasks only for people on Slayer tasks.
